first_run.rationale: Although the score decreased by one point, the textual justifications, strengths, and concerns are substantively identical between the two evaluations. The differences are minor rephrasings that fall within the scope of normal run-to-run variation. The model does not introduce any new logic or change its assessment based on the university change; it simply restates the same points about C++ experience and domain expertise.
